data.title: BeyondCorp Security Model
data.description: Implements a zero-trust architecture that enhances protection beyond traditional network perimeters.
data.technical_spec: Built on identity and device-based access management, not relying solely on network boundaries.

data.title: DDoS Resilience
data.description: Designed to neutralize, detect, and respond to distributed denial-of-service attacks effectively.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates protective measures with Google Cloud Armor and custom-developed filters.

data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure communication and data privacy via robust encryptive protocols on web traffic.
data.technical_spec: Enforces HTTPS across all services, utilizing advanced SSL/TLS encryption standards.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Monitors global-scale threats using machine learning to identify new and evolving dangers.
data.technical_spec: In deployed machine learning algorithms and heuristic analysis for real-time threat assessments.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Employs proactive measures to identify and rectify vulnerabilities before exploitation.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes an internal Project Zero team dedicated to discovering and mitigating unknown vulnerabilities.
